facials.name: Beautywell Signature Facial
facials.description: A fully customized facial tailored to your skin's needs. Double cleanse, enzyme exfoliation, steam, extractions, custom mask, and finishing serums with device-assisted infusion for deep product penetration.

facials.name: HydraLux Infusion
facials.description: An intensely hydrating treatment using hyaluronic layering and device-assisted infusion to drive active ingredients deep into the skin. Finished with a collagen bio-cellulose mask for plumped, dewy results.

facials.name: Timeless Renewal
facials.description: Our most luxurious anti-aging ritual. Microcurrent therapy sculpts and lifts facial contours while peptide serums are infused deep into the skin. Finished with a firming mask for visibly tighter, radiant skin.

facials.name: Brilliance Peel
facials.description: A professional-grade chemical peel using a customized blend of AHAs, BHAs, and botanical brighteners. Targets hyperpigmentation, texture, acne scarring, and uneven tone with visible results after one session.

facials.name: Lumin LED Therapy
facials.description: Harnesses clinical-grade LED wavelengths paired with a calming enzyme treatment. Red light stimulates collagen, blue light targets acne bacteria, and near-infrared reduces inflammation deep within the skin.

waxing.name: Upper Lip Wax
waxing.description: Quick, precise removal for a smooth, clean finish.

waxing.name: Brow Shaping Wax
waxing.description: Custom shaping to frame your face — brows mapped, waxed, and tidied.

waxing.name: Lip + Brow Wax
waxing.description: Both services together at a combined rate.
